subject: Re:/   NEW  **
body:
how do we make me privileged  -  I mean a priviledged one   ? -- I hardly 
blame you at all and believe that too.
Innocuous is better -  Trust   is NOT my thing  - .  Give me a hint or call 
so we can have a private chat.
I understand you
 
Marcia  M.
